subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling of the garden of God's love! In this paradise of divine bestowals, raise high thy stature and adorn thyself with leaves and blossoms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بوستان محبت الله در این ریاض موهبت قدی بفراز و برگ و شکوفه بساز از
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
